mapper.select: SELECT com_cd_seq ,com_grp_cd_seq ,com_cd ,com_std_cd ,com_cd_nm ,com_cd_desc ,refval01 ,refval02 ,refval03 ,sort_seq ,use_yn ,created_by ,updated_by ,created_at::timestamp AS created_at ,updated_at::timestamp AS updated_at FROM event.com_cd WHERE com_grp_cd_seq = #{comGrpCdSeq} ORDER BY sort_seq, com_cd
